sentences.target: Ich habe denselben Pullover wie du.

translations.de: Ich habe denselben Pullover wie du.
translations.en: I have the same sweater as you.
translations.es: Tengo el mismo suéter que tú.
translations.fr: J’ai le même pull que toi.
translations.it: Ho lo stesso maglione che hai tu.
translations.ru: У меня такой же свитер, как у тебя.
translations.pt: Eu tenho o mesmo suéter que você.
translations.he: יש לי אותו סוודר כמו שלך.
translations.tr: Benim de seninkiyle aynı kazağım var.
translations.vi: Mình có cái áo len y như bạn.
translations.nl: Ik heb dezelfde trui als jij.
translations.uk: У мене такий самий светр, як у тебе.
translations.hi: मेरे पास तुम्हारे जैसा ही स्वेटर है.
translations.pl: Mam taki sam sweter jak ty.
translations.el: Έχω το ίδιο πουλόβερ με εσένα.
translations.nb: Jeg har samme genser som deg.
translations.id: Aku punya sweter yang sama seperti kamu.
translations.sv: Jag har samma tröja som du.
translations.da: Jeg har den samme trøje som dig.
translations.fi: Minulla on sama villapaita kuin sinulla.
translations.ja: あなたと同じセーターを持ってる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; expresses possession.
Demonstrative determiner inflected for masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Pullover' to indicate identity.
Common noun; direct object of 'habe'.
Comparative subordinator introducing the equality target.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; complement of the comparative 'wie' (elliptical: 'wie du (hast/trägst)').

sentences.target: Sie nimmt dieselbe Bahn wie gestern.

translations.de: Sie nimmt dieselbe Bahn wie gestern.
translations.en: She takes the same train as yesterday.
translations.es: Ella toma el mismo tren que ayer.
translations.fr: Elle prend le même train qu’hier.
translations.it: Lei prende lo stesso treno di ieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 她还是坐昨天那趟火车。
translations.ru: Она едет тем же поездом, что и вчера.
translations.pt: Ela pega o mesmo trem que pegou ontem.
translations.he: היא נוסעת באותה רכבת כמו אתמול.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đi chuyến tàu giống hôm qua.
translations.ar: هي تستقل القطار نفسه الذي استقلته أمس.
translations.nl: Ze neemt dezelfde trein als gisteren.
translations.uk: Вона їде тим самим потягом, що й учора.
translations.hu: Ő ugyanazzal a vonattal megy, mint tegnap.
translations.hi: वह कल वाली ही ट्रेन लेती है.
translations.pl: Ona jedzie tym samym pociągiem co wczoraj.
translations.el: Παίρνει το ίδιο τρένο όπως χτες.
translations.nb: Hun tar samme tog som i går.
translations.id: Dia naik kereta yang sama seperti kemarin.
translations.sv: Hon tar samma tåg som i går.
translations.ro: Ea ia același tren ca ieri.
translations.cs: Ona jede stejným vlakem jako včera.
translations.da: Hun tager det samme tog som i går.
translations.fi: Hän menee samalla junalla kuin eilen.
translations.ja: 彼女は昨日と同じ電車に乗る。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Demonstrative determiner inflected for feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Bahn'.
Common noun; direct object of 'nimmt'.
Comparative subordinator introducing the comparison anchor.
Temporal adverb; serves as the comparison target ('wie gestern').

translations.hi: हम उसी रास्ते से जाते हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは同じ道を行く。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural.
Demonstrative determiner inflected for masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Weg'.
Common noun; direct object of 'nehmen'.

sentences.target: Max und Tanja wohnen im selben Haus wie Lea.
sentences.reading: /maks ʊnt ˈtaːnja ˈvoːnən ɪm ˈzɛlbən haʊs viː ˈleːa/

translations.de: Max und Tanja wohnen im selben Haus wie Lea.
translations.ipa: /maks ʊnt ˈtaːnja ˈvoːnən ɪm ˈzɛlbən haʊs viː ˈleːa/
translations.en: Max and Tanja live in the same house as Lea.
translations.es: Max y Tanja viven en la misma casa que Lea.
translations.fr: Max et Tanja habitent dans la même maison que Léa.
translations.it: Max e Tanja vivono nella stessa casa di Lea.
translations.ko: 맥스와 탄야는 레아와 같은 집에 산다.
translations.zh-Hans: Max和Tanja住在和Lea同一栋房子里。
translations.ru: Макс и Таня живут в одном доме с Леей.
translations.pt: Max e Tanja moram na mesma casa que Lea.
translations.he: מקס וטניה גרים באותו בית כמו ליאה.
translations.tr: Max ve Tanja, Lea ile aynı evde oturuyor.
translations.vi: Max và Tanja sống cùng nhà với Lea.
translations.ar: ماكس وتانيا يعيشان في نفس البيت الذي تعيش فيه ليا.
translations.nl: Max en Tanja wonen in hetzelfde huis als Lea.
translations.uk: Макс і Таня живуть у тому самому будинку, що й Лея.
translations.hu: Max és Tanja ugyanabban a házban laknak, mint Lea.
translations.hi: मैक्स और तान्या लीआ के साथ उसी घर में रहते हैं.
translations.pl: Max i Tanja mieszkają w tym samym domu co Lea.
translations.el: Ο Μαξ και η Τάνια μένουν στο ίδιο σπίτι με τη Λέα.
translations.nb: Max og Tanja bor i samme hus som Lea.
translations.id: Max dan Tanja tinggal di rumah yang sama dengan Lea.
translations.sv: Max och Tanja bor i samma hus som Lea.
translations.ro: Max și Tanja locuiesc în aceeași casă ca Lea.
translations.cs: Max a Tanja bydlí ve stejném domě jako Lea.
translations.da: Max og Tanja bor i det samme hus som Lea.
translations.fi: Max ja Tanja asuvat samassa talossa kuin Lea.
translations.ja: マックスとタンヤはレアと同じ家に住んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Proper name; first conjunct in the coordinated subject.
Coordinating conjunction linking 'Max' and 'Tanja'.
Proper name; second conjunct in the coordinated subject.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; denotes residence.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); governs dative and introduces the locative prepositional phrase.
Attributive adjective, weak inflection dative neuter singular (with definite article encoded in 'im'); modifies 'Haus' to express identity.
Common noun; head of the prepositional noun phrase governed by 'im'.
Comparative subordinator introducing the comparison target.
Proper name; comparison target ('wie Lea').
